note: CL-ENG2 fault-semantics fixtures: FULL H (coupling offdiag + pinned diagonals). g reused from pinned stage fixtures; diagonals fresh literals. Fault families pre-declared per fixture-independent rules below.

fault_families.F1_single_edge_coupling: H_{01} += t (first lex pair), all other entries fixed
fault_families.F2_generic_coupling: offdiag direction d_c = [1, -1, 2, 1, -2, 1, 3, -1, 1, 2] truncated to N(n) entries; H_c += t*d_c
fault_families.S1_single_vertex_self: H_{00} += t, all other entries fixed
fault_families.S2_generic_self: diag direction d_s = [1, -2, 1, 3, -1] truncated to n entries; H_diag += t*d_s
